basis.target_market: Serious retail traders prioritizing discipline / psychology / risk-rule enforcement. Gamified XP/streaks framing suggests broad retail (including younger traders).
basis.pricing_model: Freemium. Free forever for the core journal + risk enforcer + playbook builder + quizzes. Pro tier coming with AI coaching, voice journaling, custom quizzes; pre-launch users get lifetime Pro free (founder-tier benefit).

ai_features.feature_name: AI Coaching (planned, Pro tier) + 101 Adaptive Quizzes (live)
ai_features.ai_scope: Adaptive quizzes are per-period (post-trade debriefs that diagnose emotional patterns). Future AI coaching scope not yet detailed [uncertain — likely per-trade and per-period at launch].
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Hybrid even today. Push: Risk Enforcer alerts before account blow-up (daily loss limits, max position size, per-trade risk rules). Pull: 101 adaptive quizzes triggered post-trade or on-demand. Future AI coaching mode not announced [uncertain].
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: Quizzes work from trade 1. AI coach minimum threshold not announced [uncertain].
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Not publicly disclosed for the planned AI coach. Current quiz system is rule-based / adaptive logic, not LLM. [uncertain]
ai_features.output_format: XP / streaks / discipline score (gamified), risk-rule push alerts, adaptive quiz Q&A, post-trade debriefs. Future: AI coaching chat + voice journaling.
ai_features.notable_prompts: Concrete marketed mechanics: 'discipline score went from 34 to 89 in two months' (compliance scoring), risk-rule trip alerts before blow-up, 101 adaptive psychology quizzes, post-trade debriefs that diagnose emotional trading patterns. Win-rate +19% in 90 days marketing claim. No LLM prompt templates published [uncertain].

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: rule-adherence-scored. Playbook Builder ships free; users define risk rules + document setups. Risk Enforcer auto-blocks rule violations. Discipline score is a quantified metric tracked over time. Among the strongest 'discipline-as-core' framings on the market.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Setup-level structure exists (playbook builder + per-setup performance: 'documentation of every setup you trade, linked to your journal, to measure which setups actually have an edge'). AI on top of setup-level is planned for Pro, not yet shipped. [uncertain on AI scope]
playbook_depth.rule_adherence_scoring: Yes, explicit and headlined: 'discipline score' tracked over time (user case: 34 → 89 in two months). Risk Enforcer auto-blocks rule violations. Daily loss limits, max position size, per-trade risk rules all quantified.
playbook_depth.pre_trade_validation: Yes (rule-based, not AI). Risk Enforcer 'alerts you before you blow your account' and auto-prevents rule-breaking trades. This is pre-trade enforcement, not pre-trade AI pressure-testing — but it lives in the same UX slot.
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: Playbook builder is user-defined. Pre-built named-setup templates (FVG, VWAP) not advertised as shipped [uncertain].

privacy_stack.privacy_model: Vendor-hosted only [uncertain — AI coach not yet launched so privacy model TBD].
privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: $0/mo currently (free forever core). Pro tier pricing not yet published; pre-launch users get lifetime Pro free [uncertain on future paid $].

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: Crypto exchange auto-sync not explicitly advertised. Tradingtick framing is asset-agnostic discipline coach, not crypto-native. Hyperliquid/Blofin/MEXC not listed. [uncertain]
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Asset-agnostic (any market the user trades, but no headline asset list) [uncertain].
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Not explicitly advertised. Playbook + per-setup edge tracking suggests the data substrate exists, but session × setup breakdowns are not headlined [uncertain].

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: deep_pattern_analysis on the psychology axis (101 adaptive quizzes, post-trade debriefs, discipline score, risk enforcer with measurable improvements). Surface on the trade-pattern axis until AI Coach launches.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: Discipline score (numeric, trended over time), XP / streaks / levels (gamified), 101 adaptive psychology quizzes, post-trade emotional-pattern debriefs, risk-rule enforcement.
coaching_depth.voice_journaling: Planned (Pro tier roadmap), not yet shipped.

community.community_driven_ai: Not advertised; gamification (XP, streaks, levels) is the community-feel element rather than shared-AI-templates [uncertain].
community.changelog_ai_velocity: AI coaching is on the roadmap (founder-tier free for early signups); no AI features shipped yet [uncertain on exact launch date].
